description: You are a senior Interior Designer at Atelier Loft Studios, commissioned to convert a residential apartment into a modern open-plan coworking office for a tech startup with 12 employees. Transform the apartment shell into a professional work environment featuring an executive area, a collaborative open workspace, a client reception, and a staff lounge with kitchenette. The design must include defined functional zones with distinct flooring, necessary doors, and professional office furnishings including seating, work surfaces, storage, lighting, and decor. Save the completed design to /home/ga/Documents/office_design.sh3d.
